name: Incremental Finetune - Client 1 Full Exclusion (R2-R4) and Rejoin (R5)
description: Tests deep_incr_finetune. Client 1 is fully excluded from round 2 to 4. Client 1 rejoins main aggregation in Round 5 and finetunes for 2 rounds. Other clients (C0,C2,C3,C4,C5) remain on global model.

expected_tracks_round_2.global: Default track for active clients (0,2,3,4,5) while C1 is fully excluded.

expected_tracks_round_3.global: Default track for active clients (0,2,3,4,5) while C1 is fully excluded.

expected_tracks_round_4.global: Default track for active clients (0,2,3,4,5) while C1 is fully excluded.

round_1_rules.description: All clients (0-5) on main global model.

round_2_rules.description: Clients 0,2,3,4,5 are primary on the global track.
Global track should only contain clients 0,2,3,4,5.
Client 1 should be fully excluded in Round 2.

round_3_rules.description: Clients 0,2,3,4,5 are primary on the global track.
Global track should only contain clients 0,2,3,4,5.
Client 1 should be fully excluded in Round 3.

round_4_rules.description: Clients 0,2,3,4,5 are primary on the global track.
Global track should only contain clients 0,2,3,4,5.
Client 1 should be fully excluded in Round 4.

round_5_rules.description: All clients (0-5) on main global model. Client 1 rejoining and finetuning 1/2 (verify by server logs and global_finetuning_status.json).

round_6_rules.description: All clients (0-5) on main global model. Client 1 finetuning 2/2 (verify by server logs and global_finetuning_status.json).
